stories_meta_desc: Hear real stories from people who have transformed their lives, managed their finances, and built new habits with OneForMind.
stories_meta_og_desc: Real inspiration from users who mastered their time and mind.
stories_hero_desc: OneForMind is more than just an app; it's the space where thousands of people start taking back control of their lives.
stories_main_quote: This app is my second brain.
stories_main_body: Building Sharesa Studio while being a final-year student was crazy. Without a system that unified habits, finances, and planners in one place, I would have given up a long time ago.
stories_wall_desc: Love notes and short stories from our user community.
stories_user_1_text: I used to track my finances in 3 different apps. Now I just use OneForMind. Simple, clean, and very helpful for students.
stories_user_2_text: The Planner feature is insane! It helps my social media team coordinate campaigns without the hassle of opening spreadsheets.
stories_user_3_text: As a freelance designer, maintaining mood is hard. The Zen Mode in Journal is truly a mental health lifesaver.
stories_user_4_text: Achieved a 100-day workout streak thanks to the habit reminders. The most tangible life change I've ever experienced.
stories_cta_desc: Share how OneForMind helps your daily life. We'd love to hear your small wins and big achievements.
stories_cta_note: We'll send exclusive merch for selected stories.
comm_meta_desc: Join 12,000+ driven individuals building their ultimate productivity systems.
comm_hero_title: Grow Together.
comm_hero_desc: Productivity shouldn't be a lonely journey. Connect, share setups, and learn from thousands of builders worldwide.
comm_hub_desc: Whether you prefer deep discussions or rapid updates, we have a space for you.
comm_discord_desc: Our official Discord server. Share your dashboard setups, join accountability voice channels, and get direct help from the founders.
comm_tg_desc: Our Telegram broadcast channel. Get lightning-fast updates, sneak peeks of upcoming features, and weekly productivity tips.
comm_perks_desc: More than just a chat room.
comm_perk_1_desc: Find a partner in your timezone to keep your 1% daily growth on track.
comm_perk_2_desc: Steal the best OneForMind dashboard structures from our power users.
comm_perk_3_desc: Vote on new features and shape the roadmap of the app directly.
comm_guide_1_desc: No spamming or self-promotion. We are here to build systems, not sell courses.
comm_guide_2_desc: If you found a workflow that changed your life, share it. A rising tide lifts all boats.
comm_guide_3_desc: Feedback is welcome, negativity is not. Keep the energy high and ambitious.
comm_spotlight_desc: We will be highlighting the most inspiring and efficient Mind-System setup from our community. Will it be you?
comm_cta_desc: Drop in, introduce yourself, and let's start compounding our growth.

help_popular_q1: How to sync habits with finance?
help_popular_q2: Setting up your first goal milestone
help_faq_q1: Is my data private and encrypted?
help_faq_a1: Yes, we use industry-standard AES-256 encryption for your journal entries and personal data. Your privacy is our absolute priority.
help_faq_q2: Can I use OneForMind on mobile?
help_faq_a2: Currently, we are a powerful web-app that is fully responsive for mobile browsers. A native iOS and Android app is in our roadmap for 2026.
help_faq_q3: Is there a free forever plan?
help_faq_a3: Absolutely. OneForMind offers a robust free plan for individuals that covers all core features including habits and the planner.
help_support_desc: Interactive support to help you scale your productivity.
help_support_1_desc: Watch step-by-step walkthroughs on our YouTube channel.
help_support_2_desc: Read the full technical manual for advanced workflows.
help_support_3_desc: Fix common issues with your browser or account sync.
help_cta_desc: Our support team is obsessed with your success. Drop us a line and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
